description: You are a BIM Coordinator tasked with integrating geotechnical borehole data into the FZK-Haus IFC model in BlenderBIM/Bonsai. Model at least two distinct solid geometric volumes representing subsurface soil stratigraphy beneath the building footprint (Z-elevation < 1.0m). Classify these objects as 'IfcGeographicElement' and assign at least two IFC materials with geotechnical names (including terms like 'Clay', 'Sand', 'Gravel', 'Rock', 'Bedrock', 'Soil', 'Silt', 'Limestone', or 'Earth'). Add a property set to these elements containing engineering data, ensuring at least one property name includes 'BearingCapacity', 'FrictionAngle', 'SoilDensity', or 'Permeability' with a numerical value. Save the enriched IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_geotech.ifc.
